user.title: Connect to OpenClaw
user.description: Enter the connection details for your OpenClaw instance.

data_description.base_url: The URL of your OpenClaw gateway (e.g. http://localhost:8080).
data_description.api_key: Your OpenClaw API key for authentication.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to OpenClaw. Check the URL and ensure the service is running.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check your API key.

abort.already_configured: This OpenClaw instance is already configured.

data_description.prompt: Custom instructions prepended to every conversation.
data_description.llm_hass_api: Select an LLM API to allow StreamClaw to control Home Assistant devices, or leave empty to disable.

authentication_error.message: Authentication failed with OpenClaw. Check your API key.
